name: Oprah's Un-Fried French Fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Slice each potato into 1/4 inch oval slices, then slice each oval lengthwise into matchsticks.
3. Coat a baking sheet with three sprays of vegetable oil.
4. In a bowl, combine the egg whites and Cajun spice.
5. Add the matchstick potatoes to the bowl and mix until coated.
6. Pour the coated potatoes onto the prepared baking sheet and spread them out into a single layer, leaving space between each fry.
7. Place the baking sheet on the bottom shelf of the oven.
8. Bake for 40-45 minutes, turning the fries every 6 to 8 minutes with a spatula to ensure they brown evenly.
